query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS community_reinvestments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  memberBusinessId INT NOT NULL,
  periodStart DATE NOT NULL,
  periodEnd DATE NOT NULL,
  grossRevenue DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  reinvestmentRate DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 10.00,
  calculatedAmount DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  actualAmount DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  paymentStatus ENUM('pending', 'partial', 'paid', 'overdue', 'waived') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  paymentMethod ENUM('bank_transfer', 'crypto', 'check', 'internal_transfer', 'token_conversion') DEFAULT NULL,
  paymentDate DATE,
  transactionReference VARCHAR(255),
  blockchainHash VARCHAR(255),
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_business (memberBusinessId),
  INDEX idx_period (periodStart, periodEnd),
  INDEX idx_status (paymentStatus)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS community_reinvestments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  memberBusinessId INT NOT NULL,
  periodStart DATE NOT NULL,
  periodEnd DATE NOT NULL,
  grossRevenue DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  reinvestmentRate DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 10.00,
  calculatedAmount DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  actualAmount DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  paymentStatus ENUM('pending', 'partial', 'paid', 'overdue', 'waived') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  paymentMethod ENUM('bank_transfer', 'crypto', 'check', 'internal_transfer', 'token_conversion') DEFAULT NULL,
  paymentDate DATE,
  transactionReference VARCHAR(255),
  blockchainHash VARCHAR(255),
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_business (memberBusinessId),
  INDEX idx_period (periodStart, periodEnd),
  INDEX idx_status (paymentStatus)
);
